caption: Starting the Demo Free Fire web app built with Next.js and Supabase.
First, focus the game canvas by clicking inside it.
Move the player to the right to show mobility.
Move left to demonstrate responsive controls.
Fire bullets with the Space key to rack up points.
Watch the score increase as shots and events register.
Combine movement and shooting for pro-level strafing.
Show the current score on the HUD and beside the controls.
Save the current score to Supabase (if configured).
Open the leaderboard to verify the saved score appears at the top.
Inspect the leaderboard panel to show persisted scores.
Wrap up: explain recording this gameplay and uploading to YouTube as the next step.
